summary: Iteration 61: Complete testing of NEW PMS Accounting & Invoicing module. All 29 backend API tests passed. All frontend features tested and working: Muhasebe page (summary cards, folio list, search, status filter), Folio detail panel (transactions, balance, add charge/payment, create invoice), Faturalar page (invoice list, search, status filter), Invoice detail panel (items, tax calculation, status buttons). Navigation links working in sidebar.
passed_tests: Backend - test_login_with_agency1_credentials: Login with agency1@demo.test / agency123 works
Backend - test_get_accounting_summary: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/summary returns financial summary
Backend - test_list_folios: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/folios returns folio list
Backend - test_folios_search: Folios search by guest name works
Backend - test_folios_status_filter: Folios status filter (has_balance, settled, no_transactions) works
Backend - test_get_folio_detail: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/folios/{id} returns folio with transactions
Backend - test_folio_not_found: 404 for non-existent folio
Backend - test_post_charge: POST /api/agency/pms/accounting/folios/{id}/charge posts charge
Backend - test_charge_zero_amount_rejected: Zero amount charge rejected with 400
Backend - test_charge_negative_amount_rejected: Negative amount charge rejected with 400
Backend - test_post_payment: POST /api/agency/pms/accounting/folios/{id}/payment posts payment
Backend - test_payment_credit_card: Credit card payment method works
Backend - test_payment_zero_amount_rejected: Zero amount payment rejected with 400
Backend - test_delete_transaction: DELETE /api/agency/pms/accounting/transactions/{id} deletes transaction
Backend - test_delete_nonexistent_transaction: 404 for non-existent transaction
Backend - test_list_invoices: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/invoices returns invoice list
Backend - test_invoices_search: Invoice search by invoice_no or guest_name works
Backend - test_invoices_status_filter: Invoice status filter works
Backend - test_create_invoice: POST /api/agency/pms/accounting/invoices creates invoice with tax calculation
Backend - test_create_invoice_no_charges_fails: Invoice creation without charges rejected
Backend - test_get_invoice_detail: GET /api/agency/pms/accounting/invoices/{id} returns invoice detail
Backend - test_invoice_not_found: 404 for non-existent invoice
Backend - test_update_invoice_to_issued: Invoice status update draft->issued works
Backend - test_update_invoice_to_paid: Invoice status update issued->paid works
Backend - test_update_invoice_to_cancelled: Invoice cancellation works
Backend - test_update_invoice_invalid_status: Invalid status rejected with 400
Backend - test_update_invoice_billing_info: Invoice billing info update works
Backend - test_folio_balance_calculation: Balance = charges - payments correctly calculated
Backend - test_summary_balance_calculation: Summary balance correctly calculated
Frontend - Login: agency1@demo.test successfully logs in
Frontend - Muhasebe page loads at /app/agency/pms/accounting
Frontend - data-testid='pms-accounting-page' found
Frontend - Summary cards visible: TOPLAM TAHSILAT, TOPLAM ODEME, BAKIYE, FATURALAR
Frontend - Search input with data-testid works
Frontend - Status filter with data-testid works
Frontend - Folio rows display with guest name, dates, hotel, balance
Frontend - Folio detail panel opens on row click
Frontend - Tahsilat (Add Charge) button with data-testid
Frontend - Odeme (Add Payment) button with data-testid
Frontend - Fatura Kes (Create Invoice) button with data-testid
Frontend - Charge dialog opens with form fields (type, amount, description)
Frontend - Charge saves and updates folio balance
Frontend - Payment dialog opens with form fields (method, amount)
Frontend - Payment saves and updates folio balance
Frontend - Invoice dialog opens with billing fields
Frontend - Invoice creates successfully from folio charges
Frontend - Faturalar page loads at /app/agency/pms/invoices
Frontend - data-testid='pms-invoices-page' found
Frontend - Invoice search input works
Frontend - Invoice status filter works
Frontend - Invoice rows display with invoice_no, status badge, total
Frontend - Invoice detail panel opens with items, tax calculation, totals
Frontend - Status buttons (Fatura Kes, Odendi Isaretle, Iptal) shown based on status
Frontend - Sidebar navigation: Muhasebe and Faturalar links visible under PMS section
critical_code_review_comments: Good: All accounting API endpoints properly secured with agency role requirements
Good: MongoDB _id excluded from responses via _serialize helper
Good: Charge/payment validation rejects zero and negative amounts
Good: Invoice creation rejects if no charges exist
Good: Tax calculation at 20% KDV correctly implemented
Good: Invoice status transitions tracked with timestamps (issued_at, paid_at, cancelled_at)
Good: Balance calculation consistent across folio list, detail, and summary
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Turkish language UI consistent throughout
Good: Cookie-based auth with X-Client-Platform header working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple charges (TEST_Charge_*, UI Test Charge), payments (TEST_Payment_*, credit card payments), and invoices (INV-202603-0003 UI Test Company) during testing. Existing data: 7 folios with various balances, 2 existing invoices (INV-202603-0001 Iptal, INV-202603-0002 Odendi).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified NEW PMS Accounting & Invoicing features: (1) Muhasebe page at /app/agency/pms/accounting - summary cards (TOPLAM TAHSILAT, TOPLAM ODEME, BAKIYE, FATURALAR), folio list with balance info, search, status filter, folio detail panel with transactions, add charge/payment dialogs, create invoice dialog. (2) Faturalar page at /app/agency/pms/invoices - invoice list, search, status filter, invoice detail panel with items, tax calculation (20% KDV), status change buttons (Fatura Kes, Odendi Isaretle, Iptal). All APIs under /api/agency/pms/accounting/* working. Navigation links in sidebar under PMS section. Credentials: agency1@demo.test / agency123. App uses Turkish language.

mocked_apis.notes: All accounting and invoicing APIs return real data from MongoDB. No mocked endpoints.
